presets.c(3) Library Functions Manual presets.c(3)

NAME

presets.c - Preset option configurations for ascii-chat modes.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void options_builder_add_logging_group (options_builder_t *b)
Add binary-level logging options to a builder. options_config_t * options_preset_unified (const char *program_name, const char *description)
Build unified options config with ALL options (binary + all modes).

Detailed Description

Preset option configurations for ascii-chat modes.

Definition in file presets.c.

Function Documentation

void options_builder_add_logging_group (options_builder_t * b)

Add binary-level logging options to a builder.

Deprecated

This function is deprecated. Use options_registry_add_all_to_builder() instead. All option definitions are now centralized in the registry.

Definition at line 31 of file presets.c.

31                                                              {
32   (void)b;
33   // Kept for backward compatibility but no longer used
34 }




References b.






options_config_t * options_preset_unified (const char *
  program_name, const char * description)


Build unified options config with ALL options (binary + all
    modes). Get binary-level options preset.




This is the single source of truth for all options. Each option
    has a mode_bitmask indicating which modes it applies to. The config includes
    all options, and validation happens after parsing based on detected
  mode.


Definition at line 51 of file presets.c.


51                                                                                             {
52   options_builder_t *b = options_builder_create(sizeof(options_t));
53   if (!b) {
54     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create options builder");
55     return NULL;
56   }
57 
58   b->program_name = program_name ? program_name : "ascii-chat";
59   b->description = description ? description : "Video chat in your terminal";
60 
61   // Add ALL options from registry (binary + all modes)
62   asciichat_error_t err = options_registry_add_all_to_builder(b);
63   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
64     options_builder_destroy(b);
65     SET_ERRNO(err, "Failed to add all options to builder");
66     return NULL;
67   }
68 
69   // Add positional arguments for each mode
70   // These allow parsing of positional arguments like "192.168.1.1" for client mode
71   // and "[bind-address]" for server mode
72 
73   // Generate random session strings for examples
74   // Use static buffers so they persist after the function returns
75   static char session_buf1[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
76   static char session_buf2[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
77   static char session_buf3[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
78   static char session_buf4[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
79   static char session_buf5[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
80   static char session_buf6[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
81   static char session_buf7[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
82   static char session_buf8[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
83   static char session_buf9[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
84   static char session_buf10[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
85 
86   // Fallback strings if generation fails
87   char *example_session_string1 = "adjective-noun-noun";
88   char *example_session_string2 = "adjective-noun-noun";
89   char *example_session_string3 = "adjective-noun-noun";
90   char *example_session_string4 = "adjective-noun-noun";
91   char *example_session_string5 = "adjective-noun-noun";
92   char *example_session_string6 = "adjective-noun-noun";
93   char *example_session_string7 = "adjective-noun-noun";
94   char *example_session_string8 = "adjective-noun-noun";
95   char *example_session_string9 = "adjective-noun-noun";
96   char *example_session_string10 = "adjective-noun-noun";
97 
98   // Generate session strings for examples (sodium_init called as needed by acds_string_generate)
99   acds_string_generate(session_buf1, sizeof(session_buf1));
100   if (session_buf1[0] != '\0') {
101     example_session_string1 = session_buf1;
102   }
103   acds_string_generate(session_buf2, sizeof(session_buf2));
104   if (session_buf2[0] != '\0') {
105     example_session_string2 = session_buf2;
106   }
107   acds_string_generate(session_buf3, sizeof(session_buf3));
108   if (session_buf3[0] != '\0') {
109     example_session_string3 = session_buf3;
110   }
111   acds_string_generate(session_buf4, sizeof(session_buf4));
112   if (session_buf4[0] != '\0') {
113     example_session_string4 = session_buf4;
114   }
115   acds_string_generate(session_buf5, sizeof(session_buf5));
116   if (session_buf5[0] != '\0') {
117     example_session_string5 = session_buf5;
118   }
119   acds_string_generate(session_buf6, sizeof(session_buf6));
120   if (session_buf6[0] != '\0') {
121     example_session_string6 = session_buf6;
122   }
123   acds_string_generate(session_buf7, sizeof(session_buf7));
124   if (session_buf7[0] != '\0') {
125     example_session_string7 = session_buf7;
126   }
127   acds_string_generate(session_buf8, sizeof(session_buf8));
128   if (session_buf8[0] != '\0') {
129     example_session_string8 = session_buf8;
130   }
131   acds_string_generate(session_buf9, sizeof(session_buf9));
132   if (session_buf9[0] != '\0') {
133     example_session_string9 = session_buf9;
134   }
135   acds_string_generate(session_buf10, sizeof(session_buf10));
136   if (session_buf10[0] != '\0') {
137     example_session_string10 = session_buf10;
138   }
139 
140   // Build session string examples dynamically for discovery mode
141   // These appear at the beginning of the examples section, right after "start new session"
142   static char example_buf1[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
143   static char example_buf2[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
144   static char example_buf3[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
145   static char example_buf4[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
146   static char example_buf5[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
147   static char example_buf6[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
148   static char example_buf7[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
149   static char example_buf8[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
150   static char example_buf9[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
151   static char example_buf10[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
152 
153   safe_snprintf(example_buf1, sizeof(example_buf1), "%s", example_session_string1);
154   safe_snprintf(example_buf2, sizeof(example_buf2), "%s", example_session_string2);
155   safe_snprintf(example_buf3, sizeof(example_buf3), "%s", example_session_string3);
156   safe_snprintf(example_buf4, sizeof(example_buf4), "%s", example_session_string4);
157   safe_snprintf(example_buf5, sizeof(example_buf5), "%s", example_session_string5);
158   safe_snprintf(example_buf6, sizeof(example_buf6), "%s", example_session_string6);
159   safe_snprintf(example_buf7, sizeof(example_buf7), "%s", example_session_string7);
160   safe_snprintf(example_buf8, sizeof(example_buf8), "%s", example_session_string8);
161   safe_snprintf(example_buf9, sizeof(example_buf9), "%s", example_session_string9);
162   safe_snprintf(example_buf10, sizeof(example_buf10), "%s", example_session_string10);
163 
164   // Client mode: [address] - can be IP, hostname, hostname:port, or WebSocket URL
165   static const char *client_examples[] = {"localhost",
166                                           "ascii-chat.com",
167                                           "0.0.0.0",
168                                           "::",
169                                           "192.168.1.1:8080",
170                                           "[2001:db8::42]:27224",
171                                           "233.27.48.203:27224",
172                                           "62fb:759e:2bce:21d7:9e5d:13f8:3c11:5084:27224",
173                                           "ws://example.com:8080",
174                                           "wss://secure.example.com:443"};
175   // Discovery mode: [session-string] - session string or empty to start new session
176   // Use simple static examples for positional arguments section (dynamic strings shown in examples section)
177   static const char *discovery_examples[] = {"(empty/unset) start new session. generates a session string to give someone to connect to you.", (const char *)example_buf7,
178                                              (const char *)example_buf8, (const char *)example_buf9,
179                                              (const char *)example_buf10};
180   options_builder_add_positional(
181       b, "session-string", "(optional) Random three words in format adjective-noun-noun that connect you to a call.",
182       false, "POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS", discovery_examples, ARRAY_SIZE(discovery_examples), OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
183       parse_client_address);
184 
185   // Server and Discovery Service modes: [bind-address] [bind-address] - can be IP or hostname, up to 2 for IPv4/IPv6
186   static const char *server_examples[] = {"localhost",
187                                           "ascii-chat.com",
188                                           "0.0.0.0",
189                                           "::",
190                                           "234.50.188.236",
191                                           "9631:54e7:5b5c:80dc:0f62:1f01:7ccf:5512",
192                                           "105.137.19.11 3a08:7276:ccb4:7b31:e934:5330:9b3a:9598",
193                                           "::1 192.168.1.100"};
194   options_builder_add_positional(b, "bind-address",
195                                  "(optional) 0-2 addresses for a server to bind to, one IPv4 and the other IPv6.",
196                                  false, "POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS", server_examples, ARRAY_SIZE(server_examples),
197                                  OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC, parse_server_bind_address);
198 
199   options_builder_add_positional(b, "address", "(optional) Server address for client to connect to.", false,
200                                  "POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS", client_examples, ARRAY_SIZE(client_examples),
201                                  OPTION_MODE_CLIENT, parse_client_address);
202 
203   // Mirror mode: [file|url] - file path or URL to stream
204   static const char *mirror_media_examples[] = {
205       "/path/to/video.mp4",
206       "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ",
207       "https://example.com/stream.m3u8"};
208   options_builder_add_positional(b, "file|url",
209                                  "(optional) Media file path or URL to stream. If omitted, uses webcam. "
210                                  "Cannot be combined with --file or --url.",
211                                  false, "POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS", mirror_media_examples,
212                                  ARRAY_SIZE(mirror_media_examples), OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, parse_mirror_media);
213 
214   // Add usage lines for all modes
215   options_builder_add_usage(b, NULL, NULL, true, "Start a new session (share the session string)");
216   options_builder_add_usage(b, NULL, "<session-string>", true, "Join an existing session");
217   options_builder_add_usage(b, NULL, "<mode>", true, "Run in a specific mode");
218   options_builder_add_usage(b, "server", "[bind-address] [bind-address]", true,
219                             "Start server (can specify 0-2 bind addresses, one IPv4 and the other IPv6)");
220   options_builder_add_usage(b, "client", "[address]", true, "Connect to server (defaults to localhost:27224)");
221   options_builder_add_usage(b, "mirror", "[file|url]", true, "View local webcam or media file or URL as ASCII art");
222   options_builder_add_usage(b, "discovery-service", "[bind-address] [bind-address]", true,
223                             "Start discovery service (can specify 0-2 bind addresses, one IPv4 and the other IPv6)");
224   options_builder_add_usage(b, NULL, "[mode] --help", false, "Show help for a specific mode");
225 
226   // Add examples for binary-level help and discovery mode
227   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, NULL, "Start new session (share the session string)", false);
228   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, example_buf1, "Join a session using the session string", true);
229 
230   // Build combined examples with session string + flags
231   static char combined_buf1[256];
232   static char combined_buf2[256];
233   static char combined_buf3[256];
234   static char combined_buf4[256];
235   static char combined_buf5[256];
236   safe_snprintf(combined_buf1, sizeof(combined_buf1), "%s --file video.mp4", example_buf3);
237   safe_snprintf(combined_buf2, sizeof(combined_buf2), "%s --url 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ'",
238                 example_buf4);
239   safe_snprintf(combined_buf3, sizeof(combined_buf3), "%s -f -", example_buf5);
240   safe_snprintf(combined_buf4, sizeof(combined_buf4), "%s --palette-chars '@%%#*+=-:. '", example_buf6);
241   safe_snprintf(combined_buf5, sizeof(combined_buf5), "%s --discovery-service --discovery-service-port 27225",
242                 example_buf2);
243 
244   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, combined_buf1, "Join session and stream from local video file",
245                               false);
246   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, combined_buf2, "Join session and stream from YouTube video",
247                               false);
248   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, combined_buf3, "Join session and stream media from stdin", false);
249   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, combined_buf4, "Join session with custom ASCII palette characters",
250                               false);
251   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_BINARY, combined_buf5, "Join session via custom discovery server", false);
252 
253   // Add examples for server-like modes (server + discovery-service)
254   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_SERVER_LIKE, NULL, "Start on localhost (127.0.0.1 and ::1)", false);
255   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_SERVER_LIKE, "0.0.0.0", "Start on all IPv4 interfaces", false);
256   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_SERVER_LIKE,
257                               "0.0.0.0 ::", "Start on all IPv4 and IPv6 interfaces (dual-stack)", false);
258   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_SERVER_LIKE, "--port 8080", "Start on custom port", false);
259 
260   // Server-specific examples
261   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_SERVER, "--key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 --discovery",
262                               "Start with identity key and discovery registration", false);
263 
264   // Add examples for client-like modes (client + mirror)
265   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "--url 'https://youtu.be/7ynHVGCehoM'",
266                               "Stream from YouTube URL (also supports RTSP, HTTP, and HTTPS URLs)", false);
267   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "--url 'https://www.twitch.tv/ludwig'",
268                               "Stream Ludwig from videogames on Twitch", false);
269   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "-f video.mp4", "Stream from local video file", false);
270   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "--palette-chars '@%#*+=-:. '",
271                               "Custom palette characters to use. UTF-8 is allowed.", false);
272   options_builder_add_example(
273       b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "--snapshot",
274       "Print ascii art for --snapshot-delay's value of seconds then print the last frame and exit. "
275       "In snapshot mode, --width, --height, and --color are NOT autodetected when piping stdin in or redirecting "
276       "output.",
277       false);
278   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, "--color-filter cyan --palette cool",
279                               "Apply cyan color filter and cool palette", false);
280 
281   // Client-specific examples
282   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT, "example.com", "Connect to remote server", false);
283   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT, "example.com:8080", "Connect to remote server on custom port",
284                               false);
285   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT, "--color-mode mono --render-mode half-block --width 120",
286                               "Connect with custom display options", false);
287 
288   // Mirror-specific examples (unique to mirror mode)
289   options_builder_add_example(
290       b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, NULL,
291       "View the webcam or files or URLs as ASCII art. Like client mode but without network connectivity or a server.",
292       false);
293   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "--color-mode mono", "View webcam in black and white", false);
294   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "--color-filter green",
295                               "View webcam with green monochromatic color filter", false);
296   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "--matrix --color-filter rainbow",
297                               "Matrix rain effect with rainbow colors cycling over 3.5s", false);
298   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "--file '-'",
299                               "Stream media from stdin (cat file.gif | ascii-chat mirror -f '-')", false);
300   options_builder_add_example_utility(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "cat video.avi | ascii-chat mirror -f '-' -l -s 00:30",
301                                       "Stream .avi from stdin, looped, seeking to 00:30", true);
302   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "--file video.mov --seek 22:10",
303                               "Start playback at exactly 22:10 (also works with --url)", false);
304   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "-f 'https://youtu.be/LS9W8SO-Two' -S -D 0 -s 5:12",
305                               "Print a single frame from a YouTube video at exactly 5:12 and exit", false);
306   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "-S -D 0 | tee frame.txt | pbcopy",
307                               "Capture single ASCII frame to clipboard (macOS) and file", false);
308   options_builder_add_example_utility(b, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR, "pbpaste | cat -",
309                                       "View ASCII frame from clipboard (macOS)", true);
310 
311   // Discovery-service specific examples
312   options_builder_add_example(b, OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC, "--require-server-identity --require-client-identity",
313                               "Enforce identity verification for all parties", false);
314 
315   // Add mode descriptions
316   options_builder_add_mode(b, "default", "When the ascii-chat binary is used without a mode, it operates as either client or server automatically and uses the discovery-service to make peer connections with session strings");
317   options_builder_add_mode(b, "server", "Run as multi-client video chat server");
318   options_builder_add_mode(b, "client", "Run as video chat client (connect to server)");
319   options_builder_add_mode(b, "mirror", "View local media as ASCII art (no server)");
320   options_builder_add_mode(b, "discovery-service", "Secure P2P session signalling");
321 
322   // Add custom help sections for interactive modes (client, mirror, and discovery)
323   options_builder_add_custom_section(b, "KEYBINDINGS",
324                                      "Available in ascii-chat client, mirror, and discovery modes. "
325                                      "While rendering, press '?' to display a keyboard shortcuts help menu showing:\n"
326                                      "  - Available keybindings (?, Space, arrows, m, c, f, r)\n"
327                                      "  - Current settings (volume, color mode, audio status, etc.)",
328                                      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE);
329 
330   // Add environment variables section (all modes)
331   options_builder_add_custom_section(
332       b, "ENVIRONMENT",
333       "All command-line flags that accept values have corresponding environment variables.\n"
334       "  Format: ASCII_CHAT_<FLAG_NAME> where FLAG_NAME is uppercase with hyphens replaced by underscores\n"
335       "  Example: --color-filter maps to ASCII_CHAT_COLOR_FILTER\n"
336       "\n"
337       "  Configuration precedence (lowest to highest):\n"
338       "    1. Config file values (~/.ascii-chat/config.toml)\n"
339       "    2. Environment variables (ASCII_CHAT_*)\n"
340       "    3. Command-line flags (--flag-name)\n"
341       "\n"
342       "  Additional environment variables are documented in the ascii-chat(1) man page.",
343       OPTION_MODE_ALL);
344 
345   // Add common dependencies (these will be validated after parsing)
346   // Note: Dependencies are validated at runtime, so we add them here for documentation
347 
348   // ============================================================================
349   // Media Source Conflicts
350   // ============================================================================
351   // URL conflicts: --url cannot be used with --file or --loop
352   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "url", "file",
353                                            "Option --url cannot be used with --file (--url takes priority)");
354   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(
355       b, "url", "loop", "Option --url cannot be used with --loop (network streams cannot be looped)");
356 
357   // ============================================================================
358   // Encryption & Authentication Conflicts
359   // ============================================================================
360   // Cannot use both --encrypt and --no-encrypt
361   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "no-encrypt", "encrypt", "Cannot use --no-encrypt with --encrypt");
362 
363   // Cannot use --no-auth with authentication material (--key, --password, --client-keys, --server-key)
364   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "no-auth", "key",
365                                            "Cannot use --no-auth with --key (key requires authentication)");
366   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "no-auth", "password",
367                                            "Cannot use --no-auth with --password (password requires authentication)");
368   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(
369       b, "no-auth", "client-keys", "Cannot use --no-auth with --client-keys (key list requires authentication)");
370   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(
371       b, "no-auth", "server-key", "Cannot use --no-auth with --server-key (verification requires authentication)");
372 
373   // Cannot use --key with --server-key (both server-side key options)
374   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(
375       b, "key", "server-key",
376       "Cannot use --key with --server-key (--key is server identity, --server-key is client-side)");
377 
378   // ============================================================================
379   // Compression Conflicts
380   // ============================================================================
381   // Cannot use --no-compress with --compression-level
382   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "no-compress", "compression-level",
383                                            "Cannot use --no-compress with --compression-level");
384 
385   // ============================================================================
386   // Audio Encoding Conflicts
387   // ============================================================================
388   // Cannot use both --encode-audio and --no-encode-audio
389   options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(b, "encode-audio", "no-encode-audio",
390                                            "Cannot use both --encode-audio and --no-encode-audio");
391 
392   // ============================================================================
393   // Display & Screen Conflicts
394   // ============================================================================
395 
396   // ============================================================================
397   // Requirements (dependencies that must be satisfied)
398   // ============================================================================
399   // --snapshot-delay requires --snapshot
400   options_builder_add_dependency_requires(b, "snapshot-delay", "snapshot",
401                                           "Option --snapshot-delay requires --snapshot");
402 
403   // --loop requires --file (can't loop network streams)
404   options_builder_add_dependency_requires(b, "loop", "file", "Option --loop requires --file");
405 
406   const options_config_t *config = options_builder_build(b);
407   options_builder_destroy(b);
408   return config;
409 }






References acds_string_generate(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    b, ERROR_MEMORY, OPTION_MODE_ALL,
    OPTION_MODE_BINARY, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT,
    OPTION_MODE_CLIENT_LIKE, OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
    OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC, OPTION_MODE_MIRROR,
    OPTION_MODE_SERVER, OPTION_MODE_SERVER_LIKE,
    options_builder_add_custom_section(),
    options_builder_add_dependency_conflicts(),
    options_builder_add_dependency_requires(),
    options_builder_add_example(),
    options_builder_add_example_utility(),
    options_builder_add_mode(), options_builder_add_positional(),
    options_builder_add_usage(), options_builder_build(),
    options_builder_create(), options_builder_destroy(),
    options_registry_add_all_to_builder(), parse_client_address(),
    parse_mirror_media(), parse_server_bind_address(),
    safe_snprintf(), SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by action_create_config(),
    action_create_manpage(), options_init(), and
  usage().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.3
    ascii-chat
